name: Python 3.12 Bot
author: nebula
description: Generic Python 3.12 runtime. Installs requirements.txt then runs your main file.

script: if [ -n "$GIT_REPO" ]; then git clone --depth 1 -b "$GIT_BRANCH" "$GIT_REPO" /home/container/_src && cp -a /home/container/_src/. /home/container/ && rm -rf /home/container/_src; fi
cd /home/container && [ -f requirements.txt ] && pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt || true
